transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: My card isn't working. It's been declined three times now and I have money in my account.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It might be a chip issue. Have you tried a different machine?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yes, two different machines and contactless too.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sometimes cards just stop working. You'd need to come into a branch to sort that out.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Come into a branch? Can't you check what's wrong on the system?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: The card system is separate. I can't tell you why it's blocked from here.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: My nearest branch is thirty miles away. Is it blocked for fraud?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can't see that. I could order you a new card but that takes up to two weeks.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Two weeks? Can you not just unblock it over the phone?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Branch is your best option. Sorry.

planted_violations: failed to check card block reason on account system
directed customer to branch unnecessarily — card unblocking can be done over the phone
provided incorrect card delivery timeframe (stated two weeks)
left card blocked with no action taken or reference provided
